event: FCC Covered List firmware prohibition (Jan 1 2027) creates operational cliff for ~47,000 municipal/federal DJI units with no Blue UAS budget allocated — stranded asset write-offs Q4 2026.

No federal appropriation identified for municipal conversion.

No federal conversion funding appropriated

Autel's proprietary architecture requires component-level analysis vs board-level comparison — extends enforcement timeline but does not prevent it. Texas AG precedent (passthrough template) applies regardless of architecture.

Autel 90% Chinese sourcing + China manufacturing triggers §848

evidence_basis: Gray zone flags document verified DJI component integration (Anzu PCB layouts match DJI Mavic 3, SkyRover connects to DJI cloud, firmware signed with DJI keys). No gray zone delta movement suggests DJI unable to demonstrate technical separation.
